title: What are those worm things in the shoulder of the Mass Produced Evas
display_title: What are those worm things in the shoulder of the Mass Produced Evas
wikitext:
[]: What are those worm things in the shoulder of the Mass Produced Evas?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Tue Oct 24, 2017 2:26 pm Just before Third Impact really begins, when Unit 01, Lilith's head, and the 12 Mass Produced Evas are in space, there's a shot where one of the previously destroyed units looks at the camera, and you can see wiggling, squirming tendrils coming from it's right shoulder where it was cut by Unit 02. What the hell are these? I thought they might be tendons, but tendons don't work like that, when cut, they snap back inwards.

[]: Re: What are those worm things in the shoulder of the Mass Produced Evas?             Quote Post by jasperpham » Mon Oct 30, 2017 11:36 am I don't know, why are you asking me?

[]: Re: What are those worm things in the shoulder of the Mass Produced Evas?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Tue Nov 28, 2017 10:07 pm AdamMalkobitch wrote: Just before Third Impact really begins, when Unit 01, Lilith's head, and the 12 Mass Produced Evas are in space, there's a shot where one of the previously destroyed units looks at the camera, and you can see wiggling, squirming tendrils coming from it's right shoulder where it was cut by Unit 02. What the hell are these? I thought they might be tendons, but tendons don't work like that, when cut, they snap back inwards.
